remaining_tasks.progress: Changes are unstaged in working tree — refactors buildEditItemRow from <tr> to <div class='edit-item-card'>, removes inline <style> block from modal HTML, updates querySelector selectors (closest('td') → parentElement), changes Add Item button to create div wrapper

remaining_tasks.name: Task 4: Human-verify UAT — mobile cards, 3-dot menu, scroll-close, desktop parity
Update STATE.md and mark Phase 74 complete

human_actions_pending.action: Perform UAT for Phase 74-03 per the checklist in 74-03-PLAN.md Task 4 <how-to-verify>
human_actions_pending.context: All 3 code tasks are committed. Test on mobile (375px): cards visible, 3-dot opens Edit/Cancel, scroll closes dropdown, desktop table + right-click unchanged. Full checklist in plan file.

decisions.decision: buildEditItemRow now emits <div class='edit-item-card'> (full card layout) instead of <tr>
decisions.rationale: The Phase 74-03 fix commit (557c29e) used an inline @media block to stack table rows as cards — this uncommitted refactor removes that hack and makes the card layout native (div-based)

next_action: 1. Commit the uncommitted mrf-form.js edit item card refactor. 2. Present the UAT checklist (Task 4 from 74-03-PLAN.md) to the user. 3. After 'approved', write 74-03-SUMMARY.md. 4. Run /gsd:complete-milestone.
context_notes: Phase 74 is the LAST phase of v3.2 milestone. After 74-03 UAT passes, the next step is /gsd:complete-milestone to close out v3.2. The uncommitted mrf-form.js changes are a clean refactor of the edit modal item rows from a table-row (<tr>) approach to a native card-div approach — needed because the previous @media inline style block was a hack that depended on table row structure. The refactor also fixes the 'closest("td")' selector bug that would have broken unit 'others' toggle on mobile.
